title: This Won't End Well for Windows: LegacyHive Points to a Troubling Future
summary: Windows 11’s Patch Tuesday update last week included some 570 security fixes . Read on for a look at what’s going on with Nightmare Eclipse, some fascinating benchmarks comparing Windows with SteamOS, and what Apple’s macOS Golden Gate taught me about Windows.
